raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed ASAP Act would ensure abortion support organizations and providers have adequate funding to serve individuals seeking abortion-related services in California.",
    "Over 36 million women and other people who may become pregnant will lose access to abortion care if the U.S. Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade.",
    "Logistical barriers such as transportation, lodging, wage support, sick leave, and childcare significantly impact individuals seeking an abortion.",
    "Practical support necessities for callers to ACCESS REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE include travel, lodging, childcare, doula support, and food.",
    "Barriers to abortion access extend beyond legal restrictions and include travel costs, childcare needs, and time off work.",
    "SB 1142 aims to increase transparency and communication regarding protections and resources for individuals seeking abortion care.",
    "The ASAP Act includes the establishment of a grant program to provide funds for abortion support organizations assisting patients."
  ]
}
```
